number: On the plate are several spicy chicken drumsticks, their skins coated in a glossy, reddish glaze with slightly charred edges. Beside them sits a mix of vegetables: green beans, sliced carrots, and pieces of capsicum and zucchini, lightly roasted and speckled with seasoning.
